name: Rentvine Property Management API
what_it_does: Rentvine property management REST API for residential rental portfolio management, tenant lifecycle, and property accounting. Enables AI agents to manage property listing and vacancy tracking for rental portfolio management, handle tenant application processing and screening for leasing automation, access lease creation and renewal management for tenant lifecycle automation, retrieve rent collection and payment processing for property cash flow management, manage maintenance request tracking and vendor coordination for property operations, handle trust accounting and owner disbursement for property management financial compliance, access inspection scheduling and property condition reporting for asset management, retrieve tenant communication and notice generation for compliance documentation, manage portfolio-level reporting and owner statements for property management analytics, and integrate Rentvine with marketing platforms, tenant screening services, and accounting systems.
use_cases: Processing rental applications from leasing automation agents
Collecting rent from payment management agents
Coordinating maintenance from property operations agents
Generating owner statements from property accounting agents
not_for: Commercial real estate without residential rental component
Vacation rental without traditional lease structure
HOA management without rental property operations
best_when: A residential property management company, real estate investor, or property management SaaS platform wanting AI agents to automate tenant screening, lease management, rent collection, maintenance coordination, and owner accounting.
avoid_when: FAIR HOUSING ACT COMPLIANCE: Automated tenant screening and application processing must comply with FHA and state fair housing laws; automated adverse action on applications based on protected class characteristics creates fair housing discrimination liability. FCRA adverse action for tenant screening — automated denial based on credit or background check requires FCRA-compliant adverse action notice; automated rejection without adverse action notice and copy of report creates federal FCRA violation. State landlord-tenant law variance — automated lease terms, notice periods, and eviction procedures must comply with state and local landlord-tenant laws; automated lease generation with non-compliant terms or notice periods creates unlawful lease provisions. Trust accounting compliance — automated property management trust account management must comply with state real estate commission rules on client fund handling; automated trust accounting errors create state real estate license disciplinary risk.

auth.notes: Rentvine uses API key and OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Dallas, Texas HQ. Founded 2019. Private. Modern cloud-native property management platform. Single-family and multi-family residential focus. Trust accounting and owner portal. Competes with Buildium, AppFolio, and Propertyware for property management software.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-unit monthly pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-unit monthly pricing; volume discounts for large portfolios
pricing.notes: Dallas, Texas. Founded 2019. Private. Modern cloud-native PM platform. Per-unit pricing. Single-family and multi-family focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer documentation

known_agent_gotchas: FAIR HOUSING SCREENING COMPLIANCE: Automated tenant screening application ranking must not use protected class characteristics (race, color, religion, national origin, sex, disability, familial status); automated screening criteria must be consistently applied; document screening criteria for fair housing audit defense

FCRA adverse action notice — automated tenant denial from credit or background report requires FCRA adverse action notice with report copy and dispute rights; automated rejection without notice creates federal FCRA violation

State landlord-tenant law variance — automated lease notice periods, late fees, and security deposit limits must comply with state law; automated lease generation must apply state-specific terms and be reviewed by licensed property manager

Trust accounting three-way reconciliation — automated property management trust accounting must maintain three-way reconciliation (bank statement, trust ledger, owner ledger); automated trust accounting without reconciliation creates state real estate commission compliance risk

Eviction moratorium and rent control — automated eviction notice generation must check current state and local eviction rules and rent control ordinances; automated eviction notices during moratorium periods create invalid process and tenant claims
ACH payment failure handling — automated rent collection via ACH must handle NSF and return processing with correct late fee assessment and payment plan workflow
agent_readiness.security_notes: Property management. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Tenant and property financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Property management. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Tenant and rental data.
